overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a character exploring the candlelit Great Hall of Hogwarts castle at night. The character walks through the grand hall with its iconic suspended dragon skeleton, explores a side faculty room, and examines the medieval architecture and tapestries.

scene_state.functional_zone: Great Hall main floor with long wooden dining tables

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the Great Hall between rows of wooden dining tables

entered.detail: long wooden benches and tables arranged in rows throughout the hall
large gothic stone arches at the end of the hall
iron chandeliers with candles hanging from the high ceiling
tall gothic windows with dark blue tinted glass

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the vast candlelit Great Hall, passing between rows of wooden dining tables. Gothic stone arches and tall stained glass windows line the walls, while chandeliers hang from the high vaulted ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone staircase with ornate balustrade

events.description: character begins ascending the grand staircase toward the upper level
massive dragon skeleton suspended from ceiling comes into view

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase toward the upper balcony

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with carved stone balustrade
massive skeletal remains of a dragon suspended from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand stone staircase, revealing the massive dragon skeleton suspended from the ceiling. The wooden tables of the main hall fall behind as the stone balustrade comes into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: faculty office with lit fireplace and wooden desk

events.description: character enters a side room through a heavy wooden door
character exits the room back to the upper balcony

agents.ego_description: entering a cozy side room with a fireplace, briefly looking around before exiting

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with iron hinges and studs
large stone fireplace with burning fire
wooden desk with papers and oil lamp
tall bookshelves filled with leather-bound books

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small faculty office through a heavy wooden door, revealing a warm fireplace, wooden desk, and bookshelves. After a brief look around, the character exits back to the balcony.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper balcony overlooking the Great Hall

events.description: character pauses to look up at the dragon skeleton from the balcony

agents.ego_description: standing on the balcony looking at the suspended dragon skeleton and the hall below

entered.detail: ornate stone railing along the balcony edge overlooking the hall

segments.scene_description: Back on the upper balcony, the character observes the massive dragon skeleton suspended overhead. The stone balustrade frames the view of the Great Hall below, with chandeliers and stained glass windows visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: Great Hall main floor near the back wall

events.description: character descends from the balcony back to the main floor

agents.ego_description: walking along the back of the hall beneath the dragon skeleton toward the wall tapestry

entered.detail: large framed tapestry hanging on the stone back wall
tall wooden cabinet with glass doors

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the main floor and walks along the back wall beneath the dragon skeleton. A large wall tapestry and wooden cabinet come into view as the character approaches the far end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: back wall with framed tapestry and wooden cabinet

events.description: character stops to examine the wall tapestry up close

agents.ego_description: approaching and examining the detailed wall tapestry depicting a mythical scene

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the back wall for a closer look at the detailed tapestry. The dragon skeleton is now behind the character as they focus on the intricate weaving of the wall hanging and nearby wooden cabinet.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through the candlelit Great Hall, moving from the expansive main floor to an intimate faculty office before returning to the hall's detailed perimeter. It begins by gliding past rows of wooden dining tables beneath Gothic stone arches and vaulted ceilings, then ascends a grand stone staircase as the massive suspended dragon skeleton comes into view. The camera then shifts from the open air of the balcony into a cozy faculty office filled with bookshelves and a warm fireplace, before retreating back to the stone balustrade to overlook the chandeliers and stained glass below. Finally, the perspective descends back to the main floor to move along the back wall, passing beneath the dragon skeleton and turning toward a large, intricate wall tapestry and a wooden cabinet.
